idea-plugin.name: Postman MCP Server
idea-plugin.description:
Connect any AI agent installed in your IDE to your Postman workspace via the Postman MCP Server.

Getting started: Install the plugin, enter your Postman API key in the prompt that appears, then accept the IDE's prompt to enable the MCP server. That's it — no manual config files, no restarts.

To update your API key later, use Tools → Update Postman API Key.

Supported AI agents (all share the same MCP config automatically):

  • JetBrains AI Assistant
  • GitHub Copilot (JetBrains plugin)
  • Junie, Codex, Claude — and any future JetBrains AI agent

Once connected, your AI agent can:

  • Manage Postman collections, workspaces, and environments
  • Run API tests and generate client code
  • Search public and private API definitions
  • Create and update Postman specs from code

Requirements: IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1 or later with at least one supported AI agent plugin installed.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0
  • Initial release — configure Postman MCP Server for any installed AI agent (JetBrains AI Assistant, GitHub Copilot)

action.description: Update the Postman API key used by the MCP server
